drone_supply_chain_role.notes: True Blue Power manufactures aviation power system components (lithium-ion batteries, inverters, AC-to-DC converters, emergency battery power supplies) sold to aircraft OEMs and operators, including the UAV/Advanced Air Mobility market.

items.name: Gen5 TB50 / TB20 Lithium-ion Aircraft Batteries

evidence.snippet: True Blue Power, the leading manufacturer of lithium-ion aircraft batteries, and 101 Aviation, a Texas-based company specializing in Supplemental Type Certificate (STC) development, today announced the True Blue Power Gen5 TB50 (50 amp-hour) and TB20 (20 amp-hour) lithium-ion batteries will be available for Gulfstream and Bombardier aircraft beginning Q1 2026 with additional aircraft certifications to follow.

True Blue Power today introduced the company’s modular TC800 Series Converters during the New Product Introduction session at the Aircraft Electronics Association (AEA) International Convention and Trade Show in Dallas, Texas.

items.name: TS32 Series / TS56 Emergency Battery Power Supplies
items.product_type: NiMH emergency battery power supply for aircraft

evidence.snippet: [![New TS32 Series and TS56 nickel-metal hydride (NiMH) emergency battery power supplies](https://www.mcico.com/media/wysiwyg/ts32-ts56-press_phenom-300_thumb.png "New TS32 Series and TS56 nickel-metal hydride (NiMH) emergency battery power supplies")](https://www.mcico.com/truebluepower/resource-center/true-blue-power-emergency-batteries-increase-dispatch-reliability-and-reduce-maintenance-costs "New TS32 Series and TS56 nickel-metal hydride (NiMH) emergency battery power supplies")

tagline: Manufactures lithium-ion aircraft batteries (Gen5 TB50/TB20), power converters (TC800), and emergency battery supplies (TS32/TS56) for general, business, commercial, and military aviation. Production-ready. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence on defense contracts or unmanned-systems integration is sparse.
